nodes.name: Torresian kingfisher
nodes.summary: Torresian kingfisher（Todiramphus sordidus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Torresian kingfisher。

nodes.name: Torresian kingfisher
nodes.summary: The Torresian kingfisher (Todiramphus sordidus) is a species of bird in the family Alcedinidae. It is found in southern New Guinea and in Australia. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests, mangroves, and plantations. It was formerly considered a subspecies of the collared kingfisher. Taxonomy Three subspecies are recognised: T. s. sordidus (Gould, 1842) – Aru Islands, southern coasts of New Guinea, and northern and north-eastern coasts of Australia T. s. pilbara (Johnstone, 1983) – coastal north-western Australia from the De Grey River to Exmouth Gulf T. s. colcloughi (Mathews, 1916) – coastal east central to southeastern Queensland References Andersen, M.J.; Shult, H.T.; Cibois, A.; Thibault, J.C.; Filardi, C.E.; Moyle, R.G. (2015). "Rapid diversification and secondary sympatry in Australo-Pacific kingfishers (Aves: Alcedinidae: Todiramphus)". Royal Society Open Science. 2 (140375). doi:10.1098/rsos.140375. PMC 4448819. External links Photos, audio and video of Torresian kingfisher from Cornell Lab of Ornithology's Macaulay Library

nodes.name: Todiramphus
nodes.summary: Todiramphus（Todiramphus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联27种鸟类，如Blue-black kingfisher、Rufous-lored kingfisher、Blue-and-white kingfisher等27种鸟类。
